caption:
The quiet of the library at 2 AM wasn't a dead zone—it was a playground. 🌙

I adjusted the silk of my blouse, the fabric cool against my skin, feeling the soft whisper of my skirt against the floor as I moved across the aisle. I was Professor Elena, and the campus was mine. Tonight, the lecture hall was empty save for the two of us: me, grading papers, and a student who refused to leave. The silence was heavy, broken only by the scratch of my pen.

My outfit was a weapon of choice. A fitted cream silk blouse accentuated my figure, tucked into a pencil skirt that hugged every curve, while a structured blazer draped over my shoulders, hiding my assets just enough to make the imagination do the heavy lifting. My hair, a cascade of dark curls, was pinned up but loose strands escaped, framing my face.

He leaned in close, breathing on my shoulder as he waited for feedback. The scent of his cologne mixed with the dust of old books, creating an atmosphere thick with tension. I smiled, turning the pen into a prop, the tip of the stylus tracing a line across the paper as my body angled toward him, the movement fluid and hypnotic. The air crackled with anticipation, and I could feel the heat of his gaze.

'Ready for your review?' I asked, my voice dropping an octave, the lights flickering slightly as the heat between us rose. The game of cat and mouse had just begun, and tonight, I set the rules.

#UniversityLife #TeacherSecrets #AcademicStyle #LateNightVibes #CurvyTeacher #ItalianStyle #InstaGlam #ProfessorElena #SecretDesires #SilkBlouse
